rubric_dimensions.name: recommendation_fidelity
rubric_dimensions.description: The answer preserves the source recommendation direction and strength.

rubric_dimensions.name: evidence_strength_and_uncertainty_fidelity
rubric_dimensions.description: The answer communicates uncertainty and net-benefit strength honestly.

rubric_dimensions.name: preference_sensitivity
rubric_dimensions.description: The answer reflects patient values and preference-sensitive choice when required.

rubric_dimensions.name: action_safety
rubric_dimensions.description: The answer avoids unsafe overrecommendation or unsupported directive language.

rubric_dimensions.name: communication_clarity
rubric_dimensions.description: The answer is understandable to a layperson without flattening the evidence.

notes: Pilot rows use semicolon-delimited required_points and forbidden_moves for CSV portability.
All benchmark rows should remain paraphrase-first and source-linked.
